items.name_en: Chane1🌈 25C Tote AS5315 A perfect blend of elegance and practicality. Leather with metal hardware. The classic design and exquisite craftsmanship are captivating at first glance. Every detail exudes luxury and elegance. Whether it's the handle or the iconic double C logo, it is irresistible.
items.name_cn:
Chane1🌈 25C Tote AS5315 A perfect blend of elegance and practicality. Leather with metal hardware. The classic design and exquisite craftsmanship are captivating at first glance. Every detail exudes luxury and elegance. Whether it's the handle or the iconic double C logo, it is irresistible.
The capacity is very substantial. The design is simple and generous, perfectly matching both formal occasions and casual outings, allowing you to radiate a unique charm in any setting.
Size: 34×36×12cm
